time_ms,beat_position,notes,placement_type,note_type,confidence,instrument\n189.75,189.75,0000,0,2,0.99,kick\n654.15,654.15,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1118.55,1118.55,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1571.34,1571.34,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n1803.54,1803.54,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2035.74,2035.74,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2256.33,2256.33,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2488.53,2488.53,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2720.73,2720.73,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n2952.93,2952.93,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n3185.12,3185.12,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n3637.91,3637.91,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n3870.11,3870.11,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n4125.53,4125.53,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n4346.12,4346.12,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n4764.08,4764.08,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5263.31,5263.31,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5483.90,5483.90,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5727.71,5727.71,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n5948.30,5948.30,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6192.11,6192.11,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6412.70,6412.70,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6656.51,6656.51,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n6877.10,6877.10,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n10569.07,10569.07,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11021.86,11021.86,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n11509.48,11509.48,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n12182.86,12182.86,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n12531.16,12531.16,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n12635.65,12635.65,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n12751.75,12751.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n12867.85,12867.85,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13111.66,13111.66,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13239.37,13239.37,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13332.24,13332.24,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13448.34,13448.34,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13576.05,13576.05,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13692.15,13692.15,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n13796.64,13796.64,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n14040.45,14040.45,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n14272.65,14272.65,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n14713.83,14713.83,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n15155.01,15155.01,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n15422.04,15422.04,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n16339.23,16339.23,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n16466.94,16466.94,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n16536.60,16536.60,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n16803.63,16803.63,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n16931.34,16931.34,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown\n17035.83,17035.83,
